title: Notification No.3/2004-Cus(NT), dated 05.01.2004
text: 5th January,2004 Notifications No. 3/2004-Customs (N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue No. 14/2002-Customs (N.T.), dated the 7th March, 2002, namely :- In the said notification,- (a) for Sl . No. 2 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- (1) (2) (3) "2 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Chandigarh Commissioners of Central Excise, Jalandhar , Ludhiana , Jammu and Kashmir (other than preventive work of Customs). Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Amritsar (other than preventive work)." (b) for Sl . No. 31 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- (1) (2) (3) "31 Chief Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Delhi Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive )Delhi, (Preventive) Amritsar (only preventive work), (Preventive ) Jodhpur and Commissioner of Central Excise ( only preventive work of Customs).", D.S. Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India F.No . 437/8/2001-Cus.IV Note.- The principal notification number 14/2002-Customs (N.T.), dated the 7th March, 2002 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section ( i ), dated the 7th March, 2002 vide G.S.R. number 170 (E) and last amended vide notification No. 77/2002-Customs (N.T.), dated the 5th December, 2002, published in the Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section ( i ), dated the 5th December, 2002 vide G.S.R. number 802 (E). -- 1 of 1 --
